## Summary

<!-- What is this change, and why? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor (code restructuring)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] chore (maintenance)
- [ ] test (tests)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the testing approach. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, `.env`, or credentials committed
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Used TanStack Start Server Functions (no new REST API routes under `src/routes/api/*`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
